title: oplismenus loliaceus
intro: Oplismenus loliaceus, also known as False Pheasant's Tail, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus loliaceus include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Oplismenus loliaceus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
